title: Dekton Pro Light Xf100 Trail Flashlight - 100 Lumens / 10m Distance-98mm x 29mm High Intensity LED| Tough Durable Plastic| 4 Colour Assortment| Weatherproof| Batteries Included| Comes in Form of CDU
features: High Intensity LED Performance: The Dekton Pro Light XF100 Trail FlashLight features a powerful 100 lumens high-intensity LED that delivers a focused beam with a 10-meter distance, ensuring you have clear visibility in low-light conditions. Whether you're hiking, camping, or simply need reliable illumination, this flashlight offers bright, concentrated light

Durable and Tough Design: Constructed from tough, durable plastic, the XF100 is designed to withstand the rigors of outdoor use. Its robust build ensures long-lasting performance even in challenging environments, making it an ideal choice for adventurers and outdoor enthusiasts who need a reliable light source that can endure tough conditions.

Weatherproof Construction: The weatherproof design of the XF100 ensures it remains operational in various weather conditions, including rain and snow. This feature enhances its versatility and reliability, allowing you to use the flashlight in diverse weather scenarios without worrying about potential damage from the elements.

Versatile Color Assortment: The XF100 comes in a selection of four vibrant colors, allowing you to choose the one that best suits your style or needs. This color variety adds a touch of personalization and helps in easily identifying your flashlight among other gear or in low-light situations.

Convenient Battery Inclusion: The flashlight is equipped with batteries included, so you can start using it right out of the box. This convenience eliminates the need for a separate purchase of batteries and ensures that you are ready for use immediately, whether you’re preparing for an outdoor adventure or an emergency situation.
description: Introducing the Dekton Pro Light XF100 Trail FlashLight, a compact yet powerful illumination tool designed to meet the demands of outdoor adventures and everyday use. Measuring 98mm x 29mm, this flashlight is equipped with a high-intensity LED that delivers 100 lumens of bright, focused light, providing a beam distance of up to 10 meters. Constructed from tough, durable plastic, the XF100 is built to withstand rough handling and challenging conditions, ensuring long-lasting performance and reliability. The flashlight features a weatherproof design, making it suitable for use in various environmental conditions, whether you're hiking in the rain or navigating through foggy weather. It comes in a vibrant 4-color assortment, allowing you to choose the one that best suits your style or needs. Each unit is equipped with batteries included, so you can start using it right out of the box without the need for additional purchases. Packaged in a convenient CDU (Cardboard Display Unit), the Dekton Pro Light XF100 is perfect for retail settings or personal organization, ensuring that the flashlight is easily accessible and ready for use. This versatile and dependable flashlight is ideal for camping, hiking, emergency preparedness, and general household use, providing bright, reliable light wherever you need it.
